title: hs:shape roadmap sidecar frontmatter
description: Shape of docs/product/shape/roadmap.md's frontmatter block, as written by roadmap_rollup.py. Unlike the one-file-per-record task/POC/experiment sidecars, the roadmap is a single small aggregate document carrying every milestone.

target_window.description: Free-form scheduling window (e.g. a quarter or sprint label).

contains.description: TASK-<n> ids rolled into this milestone -- a task held back by an unclosed technical-POC precondition is never listed here.

excluded.description: Tasks that did not roll into contains, and why -- an unclosed/missing POC precondition, or a task id that no longer resolves.

effort_rollup.description: Summed BA effort figure across contains (e.g. "10d", "3-5d").

poc_gated.description: True only when at least one technical-POC precondition was declared for this milestone AND every declared one closed. False both when nothing was gated (advisory, nothing to verify) and when a declared gate is still open/missing -- never raised as an error either way.

poc_gate_status.description: Disambiguates the two False cases `poc_gated` collapses: 'advisory' (nothing declared, purely informational), 'satisfied' (every declared gate closed, same as poc_gated:true), 'unsatisfied' (at least one declared gate still open/missing).

dropped_estimates.description: TASK-<n> ids whose effective estimate figure was unusable: either the task's own `estimate` field was a non-string value (e.g. a hand-edited bare YAML int), or it (or a size-derived fallback range) was a truthy string that still fails to parse as a day estimate (e.g. "2 days", "~3d", or an inverted "5-2d" range). Both are excluded from effort_rollup rather than silently mis-summed; the task itself still rolls into `contains`. Both cases behave the same on effort: neither wins outright over the size fallback, so an unusable estimate falls through to the linked story's size-derived range when one is mapped (effort_rollup may still be nonzero for that milestone), and only contributes 0 when no size fallback is available.

unmapped_sizes.description: Tasks that fell back to a linked story's size (no explicit estimate) but whose size letter has no entry in the effort_map size->range table -- a loud, counted skip, not a silent 0 folded into effort_rollup.

cycle.description: True when this milestone participates in a depends_on cycle (including a self-loop); flagged, not a build failure.
